prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 43.8 kg; Height 151.5 cm; BMI 19.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 231mg/dL; 9 months ago 211mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 44.8kg; 9 months ago 42.9kg; 6 months ago 45.3kg; 3 months ago 41.1kg; current 43.8kg), Height (12 months ago 151.5cm; 9 months ago 151.5cm; 6 months ago 151.5cm; 3 months ago 151.5cm; current 151.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 684mg/g; 9 months ago 539mg/g; 6 months ago 499mg/g; 3 months ago 519mg/g; current 535mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.80 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
